集中处理渠道、令牌、日志、用户等核心管理工作。: Manage channels, tokens, logs, users, and other core resources in one place.
支持登录、注册、忘记密码和重置密码等基础认证路径。: Supports login, registration, forgotten-password, and password-reset flows.
继续完善列表操作、表单交互和数据联动，提升整体使用体验。: Improves list actions, forms, and connected data workflows for a smoother experience.
使用本地账号或第三方账号进入 NodEW-api 控制台。: Use a local or third-party account to access the NodEW-api console.
使用本地账号进入 NodEW-api 控制台。: Use your local account to access the NodEW-api console.
需要输入验证码或备用码完成登录。: requires a verification code or backup code to complete sign-in.
请输入二次验证码完成登录: Enter your second-factor code to continue
先完成邮箱验证，再创建一个新的本地账号。: Verify your email before creating a new local account.
注册成功，邮箱已验证，可以直接登录: Registration complete. Your email is verified and you can sign in now.
注册成功，请登录后完成邮箱验证: Registration complete. Sign in to finish email verification.
请先填写邮箱、用户名和密码: Enter your email, username, and password first
验证邮件已发送，请点击邮件链接或输入验证码后完成注册: Verification email sent. Open the link or enter the code to complete registration.
输入邮件中的验证码，或点击邮件链接后直接提交: Enter the code from the email, or open its link and submit directly
新密码至少 8 位: The new password must be at least 8 characters
管理个人资料、安全设置、语言偏好和登录密码。: Manage your profile, security settings, language preference, and password.
完成验证后，账号安全状态会更新。: Your account security status will update after verification.
累计签到 {{count}} 次，累计获得 {{quota}} 额度: {{count}} total check-ins and {{quota}} total quota earned
请先填写新的邮箱地址: Enter the new email address first
打开邮件链接或输入验证码，完成注册前邮箱验证。: Open the email link or enter the verification code before completing registration.
新邮箱已绑定，可以返回个人设置查看。: Your new email address is linked. Return to personal settings to review it.
注册邮箱已验证，请返回注册页完成注册: Registration email verified. Return to the registration page to finish.
请在已登录状态下打开邮件链接，或在个人设置里输入验证码完成邮箱绑定。: Open the email link while signed in, or enter the verification code in personal settings to link the email address.
输入邮件中的 token 完成邮箱验证。: Enter the token from the email to verify your address.
邮箱已验证，可以继续登录使用。: Email verified. You can continue to sign in.
邮箱已验证，可以返回注册页完成注册。: Email verified. Return to the registration page to finish.
NodEW-api 是 One API 的 Node.js / TypeScri: NodEW-api is a Node.js / TypeScript implementation of One API. It is still in early development and is not recommended for production use.
使用邮件中的 token 完成密码更新。: Use the token from the email to update your password.
创建首个管理员账号并完成系统初始化。: Create the first administrator account and initialize the system.
如果邮箱存在，重置说明已发送: If the email exists, reset instructions have been sent
当前实例使用 quota 额度计费模型，价格页从后端公开配置读取，避免前端静态漂: This instance uses quota-based billing. Pricing is loaded from public backend configuration to avoid stale frontend data.
当前没有可展示的订阅计划: No subscription plans are currently available
输入邮箱后，系统会发送密码重置说明。: Enter your email to receive password reset instructions.
NodEW-api 是 One API 的 Node.js / TypeScri: NodEW-api is a Node.js / TypeScript edition of the One API gateway.
